meaning: European Free Trade Area 欧洲自由贸易地域 European Free Trade Association  欧洲自由贸易协会
examples: In 1972 Britain left EFTA and joined the EEC.
However, Norway is a member of the much smaller European Free Trade Association (EFTA).
Although Switzerland is member of the EFTA, it does not directly apply the CE Marking.
The EFTA Surveillance Authority, a body that polices the EEA agreements in Iceland, Norway and Liechtenstein, has already started legal proceedings against Iceland.
But the Efta was less powerful and so the UK joined the EU in 1973 - followed in 1994 by other Efta members including Sweden.
